description.unified: Deals Magic Damage 3 times to a random enemy and nearby enemies, stunning them for 1.8 sec.

Creates [Belladonna Seed] in the area around the target for 7 sec. [Belladonna Seed]: Deals Magic Damage every 1 sec to nearby enemies and reduces their [Healing Rate -> healing received] by 25% for 1 sec.
Deals Magic Damage 6 time to enemies in a wide area in front and knocks them down for [1sec -> 1.8 sec].

On Normal and skill attacks, inflicts [Poison] on the target, dealing continuous Magic Damage every 1 sec for 20 sec and reducing their [Healing Rate by 1% -> healing received by 5%]. This effect stacks up to [25 -> 5] times.

dark.unified: Enemies hit suffer increased status ailment duration by [20% for 5 sec -> 30% for {1} sec].

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but damage [ (removed) increases by 100% -> dealt is increased by 80%].
For each [Poison] stack, the target's Attack is reduced by [1% -> 5%].

dark.unified: If the target is a boss, [Poison] damage is increased by [100% -> 70%].

description.unified: [Seed of Belladonna] Reduces Mana Cost by 1, Mana of hit enemies by {0}, and recovers own Mana by [{2} -> {1}].
